---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for sdlc-orchestrator
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-line description of the feature.

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you would like this to work. If you have a concrete design idea, describe it here.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why do you prefer the proposed solution?

## Which SDLC phase does this affect?

- [ ] `/sdlc:spec` (spec drafting)
- [ ] `/sdlc:plan` (implementation planning)
- [ ] `/sdlc:impl` (implementation)
- [ ] `/sdlc:review` (code review)
- [ ] `/sdlc:test` (testing)
- [ ] `/sdlc:release` (release / tagging)
- [ ] `/sdlc:intake` (project inspection)
- [ ] Cross-cutting (hooks, skills, config)
- [ ] Other: ___

## Acceptance criteria

How will we know this feature is done? (Specific, testable conditions.)

## Additional context

Any other context, links to related issues, or screenshots.
